_comment: QA corpus manifest. Each case points at a file under qa/corpus/ and declares the expected content language; add an expected_text_file (also under qa/corpus/) to get CER/WER. See qa/README.md.

Georgian: routed to Tesseract fallback (Azure can't extract). Needs tesseract-ocr-kat + poppler installed. Detection N/A on the fallback path; add expected_text for CER.
Armenian: routed to Tesseract fallback. Needs tesseract-ocr-hye installed. Detection N/A on the fallback path; add expected_text for CER.
